summary:
Palbociclib has no established efficacy in glioblastoma due to lack of clinical trials, mechanism irrelevance to brain tumor biology, and exclusive approval for hormone receptor-positive breast cancer. No supporting evidence exists linking it to glial cell cycling or therapeutic benefit in CNS malignancies.  

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{B}}$
